name: io.modelcontextprotocol.anonymous/zowe-mcp-server
title: Zowe MCP Server
description: MCP server providing AI tools for z/OS — data sets, jobs, and USS via SSH or mock filesystem.

arguments.description: Use filesystem mock backend (no z/OS required). Set ZOWE_MCP_MOCK_DIR to the mock data directory.
Use native z/OS backend over SSH. Requires ZOWE_MCP_CREDENTIALS or ZOWE_MCP_PASSWORD_<USER>_<HOST> credentials.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_MOCK_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mock data directory generated by `npx @zowe/mcp-server init-mock --output <dir>`. Required when using --mock.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: JSON object mapping connection specs (user@host) to passwords. Example: {"jsmith@mainframe.example.com":"s3cret"}. Used with --native.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_VAULT_ADDR
environmentVariables.description: Optional HashiCorp Vault address (e.g. https://vault.example.com) for KV password lookup when ZOWE_MCP_VAULT_TOKEN and ZOWE_MCP_VAULT_KV_PATH are set.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_VAULT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Vault token for ZOWE_MCP_VAULT_KV_PATH (KV v2 read).

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_VAULT_KV_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Vault KV v2 API path after /v1/ (e.g. secret/data/myapp/zowe-mcp). Values are a JSON object of user@host to password strings.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_TENANT_STORE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional 64 hex chars or base64 32-byte key to encrypt tenant connection JSON files under ZOWE_MCP_TENANT_STORE_DIR (AES-256-GCM).

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_PASSWORD_CACHE_TTL_MS
environmentVariables.description: Optional in-process TTL for passwords in the VS Code waitable password store (extension mode).

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_PASSWORD_ELICIT_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Standalone connection-password elicitation: auto (default, URL then form fallback), url, or form. URL mode matches MCP spec for secrets (browser /zowe-mcp/password-elicit/:id); requires client elicitation.url and ZOWE_MCP_PUBLIC_BASE_URL or HTTP listen URL.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_PUBLIC_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public http(s) base URL for URL-mode password elicitation (browser opens /zowe-mcp/password-elicit/:id). HTTP transport defaults to http://127.0.0.1:<port> after listen if unset.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_JWT_ISSUER
environmentVariables.description: HTTP Bearer JWT: expected OIDC issuer (iss). With ZOWE_MCP_JWKS_URI enables JWT auth and /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource for MCP OAuth discovery.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_JWKS_URI
environmentVariables.description: HTTP Bearer JWT: JWKS URL for signature verification.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_OAUTH_RESOURCE
environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute MCP resource URL for OAuth protected resource metadata (resource field). Default: derived from request Host. Use behind reverse proxies if discovery shows the wrong URL.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer access token from Keycloak realm demo (HTTPS dev stack). Must match ZOWE_MCP_JWT_ISSUER / JWKS on the MCP server.
